title: Comedy Circus Ke Tansen
desc: Renowned personalities team up with talented stand-up comedians to put on hilarious performances, aiming to impress the judges.

title: Happu Ki Ultan Paltan
desc: Police officer Happu Singh lives a fun filled life with his large family that includes his mother, his wife and nine children. But he often finds himself in comical troubles of his own making.

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai 2.0
desc: Tiwari and Anita stage a fake wedding to acquire a mansion, a ruse that Vibhuti and Angoori join. However, things take a turn when a ghost begins to haunt everyone.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: After Tiwari spots Anita leaving the house, Angoori fabricates a story for him about a shop fire. Later, Angoori and Anita reveal the truth to their respective husbands.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: The husbands of Anita and Angoori are unimpressed by their 'time machine' facial. Meanwhile, a 'Chedu Virus' threatens the girls, prompting the arrival of Sub-inspector Tara Kumari in the city.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Tiwari and Vibhuti dismiss their spouses' attempts and respond harshly. Meanwhile, Tadka Kumari departs with Teeka, whilst David and Prem offer guidance to Vibhuti and Tiwari respectively.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Tiwari and Vibhuti fail to placate their furious spouses. Meanwhile, Tadka Kumari extends a nocturnal invitation to Tillu, requesting his presence at her residence.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Tadka detains Vibhuti and Tiwari for cat-calling Angoori and Anita. Later, when Happu tries to secure their bail, Tadka Kumari uses the situation to her advantage.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Anita tells Manmohan, who comes to visit, that Vibhuti has ruined her mood. Later, Manmohan heads over to the tea stall and runs into Saxena.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti coerces Tiwari into eating salad to ensure his well-being. In the meantime, Angoori is startled to find herself abducted by Anita.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Saumitra Babu's ghost prevents Tiwari and Vibhuti from defecating. Meanwhile, Saxena informs others about the presence of Saumitra Babu's spirit.

title: Laal Ishq
desc: An anthology of passionate love stories backed with strong emotions and supernatural elements, set in different backdrops.

title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Balaram shares strength techniques with Ghungroo, who demonstrates his hypnosis skills. Ghungroo then uses hypnosis on Balaram and abducts him.

title: Man Mohini
desc: A new couple, Ram and Sia, are experiencing some seriously creepy and unsettling things in their marriage. Is it just bad luck, or something more sinister?

title: Gharwali Pedwali
desc: Jeetu Pandey finds himself caught living a life of duality. He juggles his time with two mothers, two contrasting belief systems, and two spouses while hiding one from another.
